data.name: Emi - New Beginning
data.detailed_description:
From the moment that Emi arrives on your doorstep you'll be learning about this little firecracker. Like a raw diamond, she's been shaped and polished into the confident, charming young woman before you. In this adult visual novel, you learn about her time away, what she missed while she was gone, and most importantly, what she wants from the future. You'll experience how her newfound passion ignites a whole new chapter in your relationship with her, with romance, humour, and of course, sex.

Gameplay includes:
  • 17,000 Words of compelling story
  • 260+ Full 4k renders
  • 10+ 4K Animations
data.about_the_game:
From the moment that Emi arrives on your doorstep you'll be learning about this little firecracker. Like a raw diamond, she's been shaped and polished into the confident, charming young woman before you. In this adult visual novel, you learn about her time away, what she missed while she was gone, and most importantly, what she wants from the future. You'll experience how her newfound passion ignites a whole new chapter in your relationship with her, with romance, humour, and of course, sex.

Gameplay includes:
  • 17,000 Words of compelling story
  • 260+ Full 4k renders
  • 10+ 4K Animations
data.short_description: The shy and demure Emi has been away at college for four years. She's returned and has asked to stay with you while she gets on her own feet. See the transformation that she has undergone these past years, and rediscover your relationship alongside her newfound confidence and passion.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 Onwards
  • 處理器: Pentium® 4 1.5 GHz / Athlon®
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX® 9 compatible

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OSX 10.10 or better
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Compatible OpenGLR
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間

data.legal_notice:
Legal Disclaimers:
All characters are 18 age or older

This game contains violence, obscene scenes (naked girls and flirting scenes with sexual overtones, sex scenes), Rude humor, blood, or infrequent use of profanity.
All sexual acts in the game are consensual.
